entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Stel my vrae voordat jy te baie verduidelikingt."

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Kontroleer my antwoord voordat jy wat jouwe geeft."

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Gee my 'n moeilijkere versie nadat ik wat heb probeer het."

entries.source: "Help me answer interview questions"
entries.value: "Help my werksonderhoudvrae te besluitantwoorde"

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Hou wat beginnersvriendelijk."

entries.source: "Mock IELTS speaking"
entries.value: "Oefen IELTS speaking"

entries.source: "Practice my school presentation"
entries.value: "Oefen my skoolaanbieding"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Gebruik voorbeelde uit my examen, projek of dagelijks lewe."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: AI-prompts

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Vra om 'n piepklein eerste taak.

entries.source: Communication
entries.value: Kommunikasie

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: Eindig met 'n opsomming wat jy self skryf.

entries.source: For Speaking Practice, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Vir Speaking Practice is 'n nuttige oefenlus:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Vir hierdie modus is die taak eenvoudig: bereid toespraken, aanbiedings, onderhoude of mondelinge eksamens vir met prompts, timing en terugvoer op struktuur.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Goede prompts bevat meestal drie dingen: die onderwerp, jy huidige vlak en wat soort hulp dat jy wil. Jy wat geen perfecte formulering nodig. Jy wat net genoeg konteks nodig om die sessie te laat begin.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: As die antwoord te te breed voel, vernou wat dan. Vra om een voorbeeld, een wanopvatting, een kontrolevraag of een volgende stap. As wat te maklik voel, vraag dan om 'n uitdaging. As wat te moeilik voel, vraag dan om 'n brug vanaf wat jy al weet.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Maak die output nuttiger

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Speaking Practice on inspir.
entries.value: Promptidees en 'n herhaalbare studielus om nuttige leeruitkomste te haal uit Speaking Practice op inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: 'n AI-antwoord lees is nie dieselfde as leer. Vra die modus oor wat eerste antwoord om jy iets met die idee te laat doen.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Gerelateerde leerpaden

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Vra terugvoer op wat deel dat onzeker voelde.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Antwoord voordat jy om die oplossing vra.

entries.source: Speaking Practice prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompts en studielus vir Speaking Practice

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Begin met een duidelike vraag

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Formuleer die doel in een zin.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: studievaardighede

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Die laaste opsomming is belangrik. Wanneer jy die idee terug verduidelikingt, laat jy sien wat stevig staat en wat nog van die AI is geleend.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for speaking practice with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Die beste leersessies is aanpasbaar. Hierdie modus is afgestem op speaking practice, met eie prompts, voorbeelde en leervloei.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Speaking Practice is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Die vinnigste manier om waarde uit Speaking Practice te haal is die AI 'n leertaak te gee, nie net 'n onderwerp. 'n onderwerp wys waarin jy belangstel. 'n leertaak wys watter soort hulp jy nodig het.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Voeg daarna 'n beperking by wat die sessie persoonliker maak:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Probeer 'n van hierdie starters:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Verander die modus om in oefening

entries.source: Use Speaking Practice when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Language Roleplay. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Gebruik Speaking Practice wanneer hierdie die regte modus is vir die taak. As jy 'n verwant pad wil, probeer dan Language Roleplay. Jy kan ook die AI-leerblog bekijken vir studiemethoden, Sokraties leer, flitskaarte, rolspel en aktiewe herroeping.
